prompt: A full-body studio render of a high-detail transforming anime mecha inspired by a red jet fighter robot, standing in a confident three-quarter front pose against a clean light gray seamless background. The robot has a heroic, angular silhouette with 2 tall vertical fins rising behind the head, 2 swept-back airplane wings mounted on the back and shoulders, and 2 forearm-mounted blaster cannons pointing downward. The armor is predominantly bright red with white wing panels and lower legs, dark navy-charcoal inner frame and thighs, small yellow vent details on the chest and shoulders, and a glossy translucent blue cockpit canopy centered on the chest. The head is compact and mechanical with a dark faceplate and helmet-like structure, partially recessed between the shoulder assemblies. Add a small purple Decepticon-style insignia printed on the robot’s right wing. Emphasize hard-surface panel lines, layered mechanical plating, realistic joints, pistons, vents, intakes, and premium plastic-and-metal model-kit textures. The wings should have sharp aerodynamic edges with red striping, the shoulders should look like jet engine housings, and the legs should be bulky and armored with asymmetrical aircraft parts attached, including 2 small side fins near the calves and 1 visible missile-like detail on the outer right shin. Use crisp product-photography lighting, ultra-sharp focus, subtle shadow under the feet, and a polished collectible-toy / concept-art presentation in the style of a modern Japanese mecha design sheet.
